title: New Feature: See all bell Notifications
excerpt: Instead of having to scroll through and delete bell notifications one by one, be able to open the notifications up as a page (the same as inbox) and mass select notifications to either read / delete them.

posts.author: polina.kurotskina (Polina Kurotskina)
posts.cookedHtml: Instead of having to scroll through and delete bell notifications one by one, be able to open the notifications up as a page (the same as inbox) and mass select notifications to either read / delete them.
